title: Closing apps
drDigitalIntro:
⚠️ Don't press Ctrl+Q right now — on a real computer that closes your whole browser!
• In this lesson, click the red X in the playground to close an app safely.
• To just move a window aside, click the yellow minus button instead.
drDigitalSuccess: Red X to close, yellow minus to tuck it away — you've got it!
drDigitalHint: Open an app in the playground and try the red X and the minus button, then click Continue.
